Assessment for Human Biological Sample Management (HBSM)

External Organisation/Institution: University of Helsinki

Completed By: Dr. Anniina Färkkilä, MD, Ph.D.

Date Completed: 11.1.2021.

Human Biological Samples

Please provide the requested details for all Human Biological Samples in scope of your engagement with GSK.

This information can be provided in an existing format as an attachment or list if available.

Human Biological Sample Management

Please respond to the questions below to provide an overview of your approach to HBS management.

For GSK HBSM Team Use only

List ALL Human Biological Samples | Origin and Description | Source/Vendor/Catalog Number
(if known) | Country(ies) of origin | Samples already collected (Existing) or to be collected
Primary and metastatic ovarian cancer tissue samples | Adult | | Finland | Prospective
 | | | | 
 | | | | 
 | | | | 
 | | | | 
Is there a possibility that material of embryonic (e.g. embryonic stem cells) or fetal origin or derivatives will be used in ANY work which comprises part of this engagement/collaboration? 

Note: GSK has policies in place which restrict the use of embryonic or fetal samples and their derivatives in research. All such use requires approval by the GSK President of R&D | Is there a possibility that material of embryonic (e.g. embryonic stem cells) or fetal origin or derivatives will be used in ANY work which comprises part of this engagement/collaboration? 

Note: GSK has policies in place which restrict the use of embryonic or fetal samples and their derivatives in research. Process / Query | Response
In which countries are samples being stored and/or used? | Finland
Specify what National regulations are followed
Please list any other relevant certification / accreditation | Nation(s)
Names of Certification/Accreditation 
e.g. UK - HTA licence or US - OHRP, FWA, CAP, AATB?
Does the institution have written Policies, SOPs (& Guidelines) for:
Overarching HBSM 
Consent & Ethical Approval Management
Data Management (associated with subject/HBS)
Receipt & management of HBS for whole lifecycle (including registration, tracking, transfer & destruction/return (including aspects that guarantee security & sample biological integrity?
Are all those involved with HBSM appropriately trained on the above? | Yes 
Yes

Who in your organisation is accountable for Human Biological Sample Management (HBSM)? Or how do you assign HBSM accountability? | Research personnel handling the HBSM and the supervisor 
Dr. Anniina Färkkilä.
Do you have legally reviewed contracts with representations & warranties with your HBS suppliers & other Third Parties?
Can you provide additional information on request? | Yes
